# Express Credit & Financial Solutions

> Premium credit restoration and funding readiness firm based in Texas. FCRA-aligned strategy and Metro 2 dispute preparation for mortgage and auto financing.

Express Credit & Financial Solutions helps clients prepare for mortgage, auto, and business funding through structured credit restoration. Services include FCRA-aligned dispute preparation, Metro 2 compliance review, credit profile building, and SBA loan packaging support. Results vary by client profile.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Credit restoration and funding readiness overview.
- [Membership Plans](/membership): Service options and engagement fees.
- [SBA Loan Portal](/sba): SBA 7(a), 504, Microloan, and Express loan programs.
- [SBA Pre-Check](/sba/precheck): Free SBA program eligibility pre-check.

## Optional

- [SBA Intake](/sba/intake): Guided SBA loan application intake.
- [SBA Documents](/sba/documents): SBA loan document checklist.
